Container.Name: TeslaCamViewer
Container.Overview:
A powerful browser-based Tesla dashcam viewer with synchronized multi-angle playback, telemetry visualization, and comprehensive incident analysis tools. All processing happens locally in your browser - your video files never leave your computer.
Requires Chrome, Edge, or a Chromium-based browser (uses the File System Access API).

Config.Name: Web Port
Config.Description: Port to access the TeslaCam Viewer web interface.
